Should Mars aspect the Moon in Scorpio, the native will have incomparable courage, be equal to
a king, be endowed with wealth, be valorous, unconquerable in battle and be a voracious
eater.
If Mercury aspects the Moon in Scorpio, the person will not be skilful, be hard in speech, will
obtain twins, be tricky, will produce fictitious things and be an expert singer.
If Jupiter lends aspect to the Moon in Scorpio, the native will be interested in performing his
duties, will be biased towards people, be wealthy and be beautiful.
If Venus aspects the Moon in Scorpio, the native will be highly intelligent, be fortunate, be
endowed with riches, conveyances and beauty and will lose strength on account of women.
70

If Saturn aspects the Moon in Scorpio, the native will have base sons, be a talebearer, be sick,
poor and untruthful.
